damage.label: Damage
damage.desc: Deals damage to targets. Modifiers (pierce, execute_scale, status_synergy) on the same phase apply to this hit. Multi-hit iterates per target.

apply_status.label: Apply status
apply_status.desc: Applies a status effect (burn, soaking, etc.) to targets.

buff.label: Stat mods (battle-long)
buff.desc: Adjusts ATK / DEF / SPD on the targets for the rest of the battle. Use negative values for debuffs.

heal_over_time.label: Heal over time
heal_over_time.desc: Heals a percent of max HP per turn for a number of turns.

bracing.label: Brace this turn
bracing.desc: Reduces incoming damage to targets for the current turn.

swap.label: Swap active creature
swap.desc: Swaps the active creature on each selected side with their bench (if alive).

lifesteal.label: Lifesteal
lifesteal.desc: Heals the user for a percent of damage dealt.

hp_cost.label: HP cost on use
hp_cost.desc: User loses a percent of max HP when this phase begins.

cleanse.label: Cleanse
cleanse.desc: Removes selected categories (statuses / positive stat mods / negative stat mods) on selected targets.

execute_scale.label: Scale damage by target missing HP
execute_scale.desc: Damage is multiplied by up to (1 + scaleAmount) as the target's HP drops. Damage modifier — applies to all damage effects in the same phase.

pierce.label: Ignore part of target Defense
pierce.desc: Defense is multiplied by (1 - defReduction) before damage calc. Damage modifier — applies to all damage effects in the same phase.

status_synergy.label: Bonus damage if target has status
status_synergy.desc: Damage is multiplied by powerMult if the target already has the chosen status. Damage modifier — applies to all damage effects in the same phase.
